streets.name: Hualapai Way
streets.teachingNote: Hualapai is the westernmost road in the west-valley practice set.

streets.name: Fort Apache Road
streets.teachingNote: Fort Apache runs one position east of Hualapai in the west-valley set.

streets.name: Durango Drive
streets.teachingNote: Durango sits between Fort Apache and Buffalo across the west valley.

streets.name: Buffalo Drive
streets.teachingNote: Buffalo runs between Durango and Rainbow in the west-valley grid.

streets.name: Rainbow Boulevard
streets.teachingNote: Rainbow is the middle landmark between Buffalo and Jones.

streets.name: Jones Boulevard
streets.teachingNote: Jones runs east of Rainbow and west of Decatur.

streets.name: Decatur Boulevard
streets.teachingNote: Decatur is the eastern edge of the west-valley practice set.

streets.name: Las Vegas Boulevard
streets.teachingNote: Las Vegas Boulevard anchors the Strip and continues north through downtown.

streets.name: Maryland Parkway
streets.teachingNote: Maryland runs east of Las Vegas Boulevard beside UNLV.

streets.name: Eastern Avenue
streets.teachingNote: Eastern is the next major north-south anchor east of Maryland.

streets.name: Pecos Road
streets.teachingNote: Pecos runs east of Eastern and west of Lamb in the curated order.

streets.name: Lamb Boulevard
streets.teachingNote: Lamb sits between Pecos and Nellis on the east side.

streets.name: Nellis Boulevard
streets.teachingNote: Nellis is the easternmost road in the central-east practice set.

streets.name: Ann Road
streets.teachingNote: Ann is the northernmost road in the valley-wide east-west set.

streets.name: Craig Road
streets.teachingNote: Craig runs south of Ann and north of Cheyenne.

streets.name: Cheyenne Avenue
streets.teachingNote: Cheyenne sits between Craig and Lake Mead in the north valley.

streets.name: Lake Mead Boulevard
streets.teachingNote: Lake Mead crosses the valley south of Cheyenne and north of Charleston.

streets.name: Charleston Boulevard
streets.teachingNote: Charleston runs south of Lake Mead and north of Sahara.

streets.name: Sahara Avenue
streets.teachingNote: Sahara crosses the valley between Charleston and Flamingo.

streets.name: Flamingo Road
streets.teachingNote: Flamingo crosses the Strip south of Sahara and north of Tropicana.

streets.name: Tropicana Avenue
streets.teachingNote: Tropicana crosses the Strip south of Flamingo and north of Sunset.

streets.name: Sunset Road
streets.teachingNote: Sunset runs along the south valley north of Warm Springs.

streets.name: Warm Springs Road
streets.teachingNote: Warm Springs is the southernmost road in the ordered east-west set.

streets.name: Rampart Boulevard
streets.teachingNote: Rampart bends through Summerlin instead of following one straight grid line.

streets.name: Spring Mountain Road
streets.teachingNote: Spring Mountain runs through Chinatown to the Strip, where the named corridor transitions toward Sands Avenue.

streets.name: Paradise Road
streets.teachingNote: Paradise curves along the east side of the Strip and the airport area.

streets.name: Green Valley Parkway
streets.teachingNote: Green Valley Parkway curves through Henderson rather than holding a single compass line.

streets.name: Boulder Highway
streets.teachingNote: Boulder Highway runs diagonally southeast from the east valley toward Henderson.

streets.name: Stephanie Street
streets.teachingNote: Stephanie runs north-south through central Henderson before bending near the foothills.

streets.name: St. Rose Parkway
streets.teachingNote: St. Rose sweeps diagonally across the southern edge of the valley toward Henderson.

streets.name: Horizon Ridge Parkway
streets.teachingNote: Horizon Ridge curves along Henderson's southern foothills rather than following the valley grid.

streets.name: Lake Mead Parkway
streets.teachingNote: Lake Mead Parkway crosses Henderson east-west and is distinct from Lake Mead Boulevard.
